title: callista tricuspis
intro: Callista tricuspis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as the three-angled bean or three-angled pea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Callista tricuspis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally for its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
